subject: Composite restorative order arrived short by 6 boxes
description: Our latest bulk order of pediatric composite was billed in full but six boxes are missing from the shipment.

subject: Cannot log into the supplier ordering portal
description: After the password reset the sign-in page loops back to itself and will not let our office place an order.

subject: Request for monthly supply spend statement
description: Could you send a PDF copy of our May supply spend statement? The download button on the portal does nothing.

subject: Back-ordered fluoride varnish not showing a restock date
description: Our recurring fluoride varnish order shows back-ordered but no estimated restock date is listed in the portal.

subject: Online store checkout fails at payment step
description: When our front desk tries to reorder sterilization pouches, the checkout reaches payment and will not complete.

subject: Website contact form: request for new patient appointment
description: A family submitted our website contact form asking for a first pediatric visit and a callback this week.

subject: Equipment service portal will not save the repair note
description: Edits to the service note for our chairside compressor throw an error on save and the changes are lost.

subject: How to add a new staff buyer to the ordering account
description: I would like to invite a new front-desk team member so she may place supply orders on our account.

subject: Cannot access our standing order template
description: We set up a standing monthly order but the Saved Orders page shows the template as locked.

subject: Loyalty credit did not post to our account
description: We placed our quarterly bulk order but the promised loyalty credit never appeared on the account.

subject: Request for receipt copy of annual account fee
description: Could you kindly send a billing receipt for our annual supplier account fee for our records?

subject: Crown impressions returned with the wrong shade
description: The lab returned two crowns shaded a step lighter than the prescription; we need them remade.

subject: Bulk reorder for the summer screening-day supplies
description: We would like to place one bulk reorder of exam kits and toothbrushes for our free screening day.

subject: Order totals not saving in the cart
description: Our front desk reports that supply cart totals reset to zero after they log out and back in.

subject: Wrong amount charged on equipment service renewal
description: Our service plan invoice shows the multi-chair price though we only hold a single-chair plan.

subject: How do I download our order history for our accountant
description: Our CPA needs last year's order history; I would like to export it as a single file ahead of tax time.

subject: Two-factor codes not arriving by email
description: When we try to sign into the ordering portal, the verification code email never reaches our inbox or spam folder.

subject: Reorder status stuck at processing
description: Our autoclave pouch reorder has read processing for several days and has not shipped or updated.

subject: Request to transfer the account contact to a new hire
description: Our previous office contact has left; may we move the account contact to a new front-desk team member?

subject: Website contact form: question about class scheduling
description: A community member used our portfolio site contact form asking about weekend watercolor class openings.

subject: Invoice shows incorrect spelling of our practice name
description: Our latest invoice lists us as Bright Smile rather than Bright Smiles; could it be corrected?

subject: Need invoice reissued with updated billing address
description: We have not moved, but our billing address on file is outdated; please reissue the latest invoice with the correct one.

subject: Mobile app will not load the supply catalog
description: On the phone the supplier ordering app spins endlessly and never loads the product catalog.

subject: How to reset a team member's forgotten portal password
description: One of our staff is locked out of the ordering portal; where can an admin trigger a password reset for them?
